projects.name: Knowledge bot
projects.summary: A Telegram bot that answers strictly from the company's uploaded documents (price lists, manuals, contracts) and never makes things up. It uses RAG: it finds the relevant passage in the documents and answers from it, not from general knowledge. If the answer isn't in the base, it says so honestly. Python, aiogram, vector search, LLM.

projects.name: AI lead intake
projects.summary: Takes requests from the website and Telegram, questions the client itself (service, budget, timeline, contact), answers typical price questions and hands the manager a ready, qualified lead. It routes hard cases to a human. Runs around the clock. Python, FastAPI, aiogram, LLM.

projects.name: AI price parser
projects.summary: Parses supplier price lists in Excel with any structure — varying columns, merged cells, junk headers. It finds the header row by meaning rather than by line number, detects the structure with AI once per file, categorizes the items and outputs a clean Excel report. Python, openpyxl, LLM.

projects.name: Profit dashboard
projects.summary: Pulls sales data from the marketplace API and computes real profit: revenue minus fees, logistics, cost of goods and returns. It surfaces loss-making items that look fine by «revenue». Background sync, KPIs, charts, payout cash-flow. FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL.

projects.name: CRM dashboard
projects.summary: An analytics panel with access control: the director sees the full financial picture, a manager sees only their own sales. Permissions are enforced on the server, not hidden in the UI — a manager can't get others' data even via a direct request. JWT auth, action audit log. FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL.

projects.name: Doc generator
projects.summary: Fills repetitive documents (contract, invoice, act) from entered data in one click. The template formatting is preserved exactly, the amount-in-words is spelled with correct grammatical endings, and finished files download in a batch. Python, FastAPI, docxtpl, React.

projects.name: Data enrichment
projects.summary: From a list of companies (name, tax ID) it finds official websites, verifies ownership by tax ID, collects emails and outputs an Excel report. It won't pull aggregator emails into the base — a site counts as the company's own only once that's proven. Python, openpyxl.

projects.name: Semiglobe Brasil
projects.summary: Premium coffee brand landing: horizontal catalog scroll, language switcher.

projects.name: Shemberg Windows
projects.summary: Premium windows site with a Three.js 3D configurator.

projects.name: Hero Design
projects.summary: Design studio site: custom cursor, GSAP animations, smooth scroll.

projects.name: Sales Dash
projects.summary: Sales analytics dashboard: metrics, revenue charts, CSV export.
